name: Ecovyst Inc.
summary: . Ecovyst Inc. (Ecovyst or the Company), formerly PQ Group Holdings Inc., was incorporated in Delaware on August7, 2015. We trace our roots to the late 1800s with our first sulfuric acid plant and the beginning of our oldest customer relationship. Our common stock is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the stock ticker ECVT. Unless the context otherwise indicates, the terms Ecovyst Inc., we, us, our, or the Company mean Ecovyst Inc. and our subsidiaries. Effective on December 31, 2025, w...
